comment: Tag poses expressed in the Leksell frame coordinate system. Axes: x=0 right (tag 1) → x=200mm left (tag 0); y=0 posterior → y=200mm anterior; z=0 superior/out-of-tags → z=200mm at tag plane. Midpoint between both tags = (100, 100, 200) mm. Tag size is used by solvePnP to infer metric scale — no explicit inter-tag distance needs to be set.

tags.name: left
tags.comment: Tag 0 is on the left side (x=200mm). Position in Leksell frame: (200, 100, 200) mm. Rotation ry=pi aligns the tag's local axes with the Leksell axes (x and z are flipped relative to the tag's outward-normal convention).

tags.name: right
tags.comment: Tag 1 is on the right side (x=0mm). Position in Leksell frame: (0, 100, 200) mm.
